summary: Job market demand for LLM engineering is high, emphasising retrieval-augmented generation and vector databases (jp_llm_engineer). Academic literature confirms hallucination mitigation as a central research challenge (ax_rag_eval). Prompt evaluation and guardrails appear consistently across both job postings and published research (jp_llm_engineer, ax_rag_eval).

claims.text: Job market demand for LLM engineering is high
RAG and vector databases are emphasised in job postings
Hallucination mitigation is a central research challenge
Prompt evaluation and guardrails appear in both job postings and research

summary: Quantum computing integration with LLMs shows emerging demand across senior engineering roles (jp_llm_engineer). Fine-tuning with LoRA and PEFT is consistently cited as a core job requirement (jp_llm_engineer, ax_rag_eval). Multi-modal RAG pipelines are now production-ready according to recent surveys (ax_rag_eval).

claims.text: Quantum computing integration with LLMs shows emerging demand
Fine-tuning with LoRA and PEFT is a core job requirement
Multi-modal RAG pipelines are production-ready according to recent surveys

summary: Software supply chain security is a high-demand area with growing emphasis on SBOM generation and dependency vulnerability scanning (gh_supply_chain). Policy-as-code and provenance verification are becoming standard DevSecOps practices cited in job postings (jp_devsecops, gh_supply_chain). Package integrity verification is highlighted as a critical skill gap (gh_supply_chain).

claims.text: SBOM generation and dependency vulnerability scanning are in high demand
Policy-as-code is becoming a standard DevSecOps practice
Provenance verification is cited in job postings
Package integrity verification is highlighted as a skill gap

summary: Container runtime security auditing and eBPF-based threat detection are the dominant skills demanded by DevSecOps roles (jp_devsecops). Formal verification of CI/CD pipelines is emerging as a regulatory requirement cited in three independent sources (gh_supply_chain, jp_devsecops, ax_rag_eval).

claims.text: eBPF-based threat detection is a dominant DevSecOps skill
Formal verification of CI/CD pipelines is cited in three independent sources
ax_rag_eval discusses supply chain security regulatory requirements

summary: Cloud-native systems knowledge is in strong demand, with distributed tracing and service-level objectives identified as core operational competencies (ax_cloud_observability, so_kubernetes_slo). Serverless functions and resilience testing practices are increasingly required in production environments (gh_serverless_ops). SLO burn rate alerting is cited as a concrete emerging topic (so_kubernetes_slo).

claims.text: Distributed tracing is a core operational cloud competency
Service-level objectives are a core cloud competency
Serverless functions are increasingly required in production
SLO burn rate alerting is cited as an emerging topic
